PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-USERNAME.title: Username
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-USERNAME.hover.desc: Your user name in the Pi-Shock Website.
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-A_P_I_KEY.title: API Key
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-A_P_I_KEY.hover.desc: A PiShock API Key. You can generate one in the PiShock website, in your Account menu.
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-SHOCKER_I_D.title: Shocker ID
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-SHOCKER_I_D.hover.desc: The Shocker ID that you want this mod to trigger. You can find it in your Shocker Settings. This is NOT a Hub ID.
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-MAX_INTENSITY.title: Maximum Intensity:
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-MAX_INTENSITY.hover.des: The intensity of the discharges will never surpass this range.
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-MAX_DURATION.title: Maximum Duration:
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-MAX_DURATION.hover.desc: The lenght of the discharges will never surpass this range.
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-ALWAYS_MAX_POWER.title: Always shock at max power
Shocks will always trigger at maximum intensity and duration instead of escalate based on damage taken.
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-SEND_VIBRATION_TEST.hov: Makes the linked Shocker vibrate for a few seconds.
